title: selaginella gigantea
intro: Selaginella gigantea, also known as the giant resurrection fern or giant spikemoss, is a species of evergreen perennial fern-like plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that can help to reduce pain and inflammation. The health benefits of Selaginella gigantea include its ability to improve cardiovascular health, boost the immune system, and act as an antiseptic to prevent infections. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or capsules, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems.
